introSection: Great Pumpkin Coaster (formerly Taxi Jam) is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. This ride is the same as Great Pumpkin Coaster at Kings Island.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Taxi Jam opened as part of the new KidZville area in 1997.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Great Pumpkin Coaster (formerly Taxi Jam) is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. This ride is the same as Great Pumpkin Coaster at Kings Island.

Taxi Jam opened as part of the new KidZville area in 1997.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.
